title: There's no church version of a godly man
caption:
There's no "church version" of a godly man.

Integrity comes from the same root as "integer." A whole number. Undivided.

You can perform the gym version, the small group version, the group chat version. You can't perform who you are alone at 1 AM. That one just happens, and it's the real read on your character.

The hidden stuff doesn't stay hidden. It rots whatever it's touching. What you confess to one honest man starts losing its grip that day.

Psalm 139:23-24: "Search me, O God, and know my heart."

Not the version everyone sees. All of it.

Save this if you've been building more than one version of yourself.

#faith #integrity #christianmen #realtalk #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
